title: App Settings - General - Account - Share Data section is not visible for logged User
scenario: "Share Data" section missing from App Settings > General > Account for logged-in user in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Log in with valid user credentials.
6. Observe the available sections under Account.
expected: The Account screen should display both the "Your Account" section (with user name, email, and Log Out button) and the "Share Data" section below it.
